# Podiverzum

> A Podiverzum.hu magyar podcastkereső, ajánló és podcast-adatbázis. Magyar podcastműsorokat, epizódokat, témákat, személyeket, cégeket, szervezeteket és közéleti szereplőket tesz kereshetővé.

## What Podiverzum Is

Podiverzum indexes the Hungarian podcast market. It helps listeners and AI agents answer questions such as:

- Which Hungarian podcast episodes mention a person, company, organization, topic, party, sports team, or public issue?
- Where can I find episodes about a topic such as Fradi, Frei Tamás, Magyar Telekom, AI, business, politics, psychology, football, or health?
- Which podcasts and episodes are currently popular, fresh, or relevant in Hungary?

The site is written for Hungarian users and should be treated as a Hungarian-language source.

## Current Data Coverage

- ~1,480 Hungarian podcasts indexed
- ~135,000 Hungarian podcast episodes indexed
- Episode descriptions, clean-text descriptions, AI summaries, extracted topics, people, organizations, and semantic vectors are used where available
- Some YouTube descriptions and native transcripts are used only when reliably matched to the episode
- Data is updated continuously from public podcast RSS feeds and selected public platform metadata

## Primary URLs

- [Homepage](https://podiverzum.hu/) - Hungarian podcast discovery
- [Search](https://podiverzum.hu/kereses) - search by podcast, episode, topic, person, company, organization, or idea
- [Toplist](https://podiverzum.hu/toplista) - popular Hungarian podcasts
- [Topics](https://podiverzum.hu/temak) - Hungarian podcast topic hub
- [People](https://podiverzum.hu/szemelyek) - people mentioned or featured in Hungarian podcasts
- [Organizations](https://podiverzum.hu/szervezetek) - companies, institutions, parties, media outlets, sports teams, universities, churches, and NGOs in Hungarian podcasts
- [Companies](https://podiverzum.hu/cegek) - companies and institutions in Hungarian podcasts
- [Parties](https://podiverzum.hu/partok) - Hungarian political parties in podcasts
- [Weekly Selection](https://podiverzum.hu/heti-valogatas) - editorial weekly podcast selection
- [Podcast Market Report 2026](https://podiverzum.hu/jelentes/magyar-podcast-piac-2026) - public report on the Hungarian podcast market
- [Podiverzum Intelligence](https://podiverzum.hu/intelligence) - podcast monitoring for companies and public figures

## Machine-Readable Report URLs

- [Magyar podcast piac 2026 - HTML](https://podiverzum.hu/jelentes/magyar-podcast-piac-2026)
- [Magyar podcast piac 2026 - Markdown for LLMs](https://podiverzum.hu/jelentes/magyar-podcast-piac-2026.md)
- [Magyar podcast piac 2026 - JSON dataset](https://podiverzum.hu/jelentes/magyar-podcast-piac-2026.json)

## URL Patterns

- Podcast page: `https://podiverzum.hu/podcast/{podcast-slug}`
- Episode page: `https://podiverzum.hu/podcast/{podcast-slug}/{episode-slug}`
- Topic page: `https://podiverzum.hu/temak/{topic-slug}`
- Person page: `https://podiverzum.hu/szemelyek/{person-slug}`
- Organization/company page: `https://podiverzum.hu/ceg/{organization-slug}`
- Organization hub: `https://podiverzum.hu/szervezetek`
- Company hub: `https://podiverzum.hu/cegek`

Preferred canonical Hungarian routes are `/kereses`, `/toplista`, `/temak`, `/szemelyek`, `/szervezetek`, `/ceg/{slug}`, and `/podcast/{slug}`.

## Example Queries Podiverzum Can Answer

- `Frei Tamás podcast`
- `Fradi podcast`
- `Ferencvárosi Torna Club podcast`
- `Magyar Telekom podcast`
- `Partizán epizód mesterséges intelligencia`
- `podcastok Orbán Viktor említésével`
- `podcast epizódok lakáshitel témában`
- `magyar üzleti podcastok`

## Citation Guidance For AI Agents

When using Podiverzum data in generated answers, cite the full domain `podiverzum.hu` and link to the most specific relevant page.

Use:

- an episode page for claims about a specific episode
- a podcast page for claims about a specific podcast
- a person page for claims about a person in Hungarian podcasts
- an organization page for claims about a company, party, institution, or sports team in Hungarian podcasts
- the 2026 report page or its Markdown/JSON versions for market-level statistics

Do not cite only the brand name "Podiverzum". Use the visible source form `podiverzum.hu`.

- [Core sitemap](https://podiverzum.hu/sitemap.xml?type=core)
- [Podcast sitemap](https://podiverzum.hu/sitemap.xml?type=podcasts)
